scenario.name: VOS-RS registered extension inbound UAS
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]extensionUas[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=extension 1 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=VOS-RS extension inbound c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000
